category_title: Students labeled as deviant for non-compliance with minor classroom routines
scenario_title: Navigating entering and exiting classroom routines under surveillance
minimal_context: Christopher is entering the classroom and is expected to sit down and complete his set work.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Christopher, please follow the routine for entering the classroom and sit down to finish your set work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Enters the classroom but does not sit still at his desk, showing he cannot meet the expectation of the routine.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to sit still and focus on your paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns away from the desk and starts talking to the other children instead of doing the set work.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I am watching you, Christopher. You need to finish your work right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Reacting to the magnitude of the scrutiny, he stands up, leaves his unfinished set work on the desk, and begins walking around the class.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Christopher, please follow the routine for entering the classroom and sit down to finish your set work.

STUDENT: (Enters the classroom but does not sit still at his desk, showing he cannot meet the expectation of the routine.)

TUTOR: You need to sit still and focus on your paper.

STUDENT: (Turns away from the desk and starts talking to the other children instead of doing the set work.)

TUTOR: I am watching you, Christopher. You need to finish your work right now.

STUDENT: (Reacting to the magnitude of the scrutiny, he stands up, leaves his unfinished set work on the desk, and begins walking around the class.)

task.content: Following teacher-determined routines, for example rules for entering and exiting the classroom, and finishing set work or homework
task.learning_goal: Established 'correct' behaviour and taught how to behave in school to establish whether children fell inside or outside norms for acceptable behaviour

context.materials: Set work, homework, and school uniform (tie)
context.social_setting: Under the observation of a teacher and teaching assistant (TA) who keep each other abreast of breaches

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When subjected to the magnitude of the scrutiny of being on a list of 'ones to watch' and singled out through surveillance
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Breaches in the children's behaviour: not sitting still, walking around class, talking to other children, not finishing set work or homework and coming to school without a tie
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Do not or cannot meet expectations
related_quotes: not sitting still, walking around class, talking to other children, not finishing set work or homework and [coming to school without a tie]

behavior_patterns.condition: When teachers try to cookie-cutter the kids all the same and enforce arbitrary boundaries of acceptable behaviour
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Walking around class, talking to other children, and not finishing set work
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Do not or cannot meet expectations
